user.title: BookStack connection

book.title: Pick target book
book.description: Which book should Home Assistant sync into? Manually added content inside pages will be preserved.

reauth_confirm.title: Refresh BookStack token
reauth_confirm.description: BookStack rejected the API token for {base_url}. Create a fresh token in BookStack and paste the ID + secret here - the URL and target book stay the same.

reconfigure.title: Adjust BookStack connection
reconfigure.description: Change URL, token or TLS setting for this BookStack link. The target book and all page mappings are preserved. The URL must point at the same BookStack instance as before.

error.auth: API token rejected or missing permissions.
error.no_books: No book found in this BookStack instance. Create a target book first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error - check the Home Assistant log.
error.base_url_invalid_scheme: URL must start with http:// or https://.
error.path_invalid: Path must be absolute and the parent directory must already exist.
error.export_already_enabled_elsewhere: Markdown export is already enabled on another BookStack Sync instance. Only one instance per Home Assistant setup may export - otherwise the Markdown files collide. Disable the export on the other instance first.

abort.already_configured: This BookStack instance is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Connection updated - BookStack Sync has been reconfigured.
abort.url_mismatch: The new URL points at a different BookStack instance. Please remove the original entry and add it fresh.

data_description.export_enabled: Off by default. When on, BookStack pages are written back as plain Markdown files for use as RAG / LLM input. Costs disk space and CPU on every export run, which is why it must be enabled consciously.
data_description.export_path: Where to write the Markdown files. Must be absolute and the parent directory must exist.

run_now.name: Sync now
run_now.description: Trigger a sync immediately without waiting for the interval.

force.name: Force overwrite tampered pages
force.description: When true, pages whose AUTO block looks tampered are overwritten instead of skipped. Use after a major upgrade. MANUAL block stays preserved.

preview.name: Sync preview
preview.description: Logs which pages would be created/updated without writing anything to BookStack.

force.name: Force overwrite tampered pages
force.description: Mirror of run_now's force flag. With preview, it shows what would be overwritten without actually committing.

export_markdown.name: Export Markdown (opt-in)
export_markdown.description: Exports every managed BookStack page as a plain Markdown file with YAML frontmatter, idempotent. Disabled by default - enable it in the integration's options first.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Log what would be written without touching the filesystem.

output_path.name: Output path override
output_path.description: Override the configured export path for this call only.

bookstack_unreachable.title: BookStack is unreachable
bookstack_unreachable.description: The BookStack Sync integration has been unable to reach the BookStack instance for {count} consecutive sync runs. Common causes: the BookStack container is stopped, a network issue, or a reverse proxy is rejecting connections. The next successful sync auto-resolves this notification.

page_tampered.title: A page's AUTO block has been edited manually
page_tampered.description: The page "{page_title}" in BookStack has an AUTO block that was edited outside Home Assistant. The integration skipped that page on sync to avoid overwriting your edits. Move your notes into the MANUAL block, or revert the AUTO-block change, so the next sync can update the page again.

page_markers_missing.title: A page's marker comments are missing
page_markers_missing.description: The page "{page_title}" in BookStack lost its AUTO/MANUAL marker comments. Most common cause: the WYSIWYG editor was opened on the page — BookStack's HTML round-trip drops the marker comments. The integration skipped the page to avoid overwriting your content. Fix: open the page in the markdown editor (NOT WYSIWYG), copy any MANUAL-block content you want to keep, then call "Sync now" with "Force overwrite tampered pages" enabled — the page will be recreated with fresh markers and you can paste the MANUAL block back in.

bookstack_unreachable.message: BookStack instance unreachable (see Home Assistant log for details).

bookstack_auth_failed.message: BookStack rejected the API token. Refresh the token in BookStack and use the Reauth flow.

export_disabled.message: Markdown export is disabled. Enable it in the integration's options under 'Enable Markdown back-export' before calling this service.
